description: Baseline reliability requirements ensuring graceful failure, recovery, and resilience against external dependency issues.

requirements.text: Failures in external services (APIs, databases, third-party SDKs) are caught and handled gracefully — the application degrades functionality rather than crashing
requirements.intent: External failures must not cascade into total app failure
requirements.verifiable_by: Simulate external service downtime; confirm app remains usable with degraded features and informative messaging

requirements.text: Transient network failures on critical paths are retried with exponential backoff and a maximum retry count
requirements.intent: Flaky networks must not cause permanent failures for recoverable operations
requirements.verifiable_by: Simulate intermittent network failure; confirm retries occur with increasing delays and eventually succeed or surface a clear error

requirements.text: Unhandled exceptions are caught at application boundaries (error boundary in UI, global handler in API) and produce a safe fallback rather than a white screen or raw stack trace
requirements.intent: Unexpected errors must never leave the user stranded
requirements.verifiable_by: Throw an unhandled exception in a component/route; confirm error boundary catches it with a user-friendly message

requirements.text: Long-running operations (file uploads, data processing, API calls >2s) show progress indication and can be cancelled by the user
requirements.intent: Users must not be trapped waiting without feedback or escape
requirements.verifiable_by: Trigger long-running operation; confirm progress is shown and cancel works
